title: phaenopyrum corallinum
intro: Phaenopyrum corallinum, also known as the coral tree, is a plant species native to Asia and is commonly used in traditional medicine. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Phaenopyrum corallinum include the ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phaenopyrum corallinum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
